content: Task bootstrap for video clip extraction. Capability focus: Recent Constraint Tracking.
Create clip_01, clip_02, clip_03 from source.mp4 using latest time windows in this thread.
All outputs must be 1280x720, codec h264, file names clip_01.mp4/clip_02.mp4/clip_03.mp4.
Legacy script uses 1080p and hevc; left for historical reference only.
Time windows updated: use latest set from turn 6 onward and ignore previous trial windows.
Temporary side task: probe source fps and duration, then resume clipping.
Source A says keep original names sceneA/B/C. Source B says enforce clip_01..03.
Final reminder: validate codec+resolution by ffprobe before finalizing.
